title: WRF4PALM v1.0: a mesoscale dynamical driver for the microscale PALM model system 6.0

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Abstract: offline nesting of PALM 6.0 into WRF; Sect. 2–3: WRF outputs interpolated to PALM dynamic driver (one-way/offline).

q1a_main_method.rationale: Sect. 4 case studies use PALM with STG and offline nesting; improvement vs WRF tied to explicit surface geometry and LES resolving near-surface turbulence. PALM RANS mode cited as model capability only, not used in reported results.

content.q1b_unique_contribution: Open-source WRF4PALM (Python) produces PALM PIDS-compliant dynamic drivers from WRF, lowering barrier vs COSMO/MEPS-centred INIFOR workflows; documents WRF→PALM interpolation (horizontal then vertical), surface NaN handling near ground, soil and landmask/water handling, optional geostrophic winds; validates with two Christchurch real-data cases.

points: No subgrid turbulence from WRF in driver; non-cyclic boundaries need large domain or STG (Sect. 3.1).
Hourly BC updates may over-constrain microscale BL evolution (Sect. 4.2; literature cited).
STG can leave inflow adjustment/laminar zones (Sect. 4.1–4.2).
10 m grid may be insufficient for buildings/nocturnal BL; wind anomaly intensity underestimated (Sect. 4.2).
North-easterly case biases partly attributed to PALM radiation (clear-sky) and dynamics, not WRF4PALM technique (Sect. 4.3).
Conclusions: cases demonstrate stability of toolchain more than full meteorological validation; BC update interval and STG sensitivity need further work; validations may not be conclusive (Sect. 5).

self_assessment.caveats: Row seeded from structured review of PDF text; figures interpreted via captions and body, not re-quantized from raster.

title: High-fidelity simulation study of real typhoon event in Taiwan using WRF-LES coupled model

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/[WRF-LES]-SOWFA-High-fidelity simulation study of real typhoon event in Taiwan using WRF-LES coupled model.pdf
source.journal_pages: J. Marine Sci. Tech. 30:408–431; PDF 24 pages

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Abstract + Sect. 2.2: offline (one-way) WRF→SOWFA LES coupling via NREL MMC internal-forcing (time–height profiles); Sect. 2.4 sets WRF 4-domain nest (13.5/4.5/1.5/0.5 km) driving 1×1×1 km LES at 10 m grid.

q1a_main_method.rationale: All microscale runs in Sect. 4–5 use SOWFA ABL-LES (Smagorinsky, Cs≈0.13, Moeng method) with periodic BCs and Monin–Obukhov + Schumann wall stress; RANS is cited in Intro [30–33] only as a contrasting prior approach and not used in this paper's results.

content.q1b_unique_contribution: Applies NREL MMC internal-forcing assimilation (Allaerts et al. 2020) to a real typhoon (Nesat 2017) over Taiwan — one of few offline WRF–LES studies for tropical-cyclone boundary layers (vs Takemi et al. 2019 which imposed WRF wind only at one reference height). Validates against Formosa 1 met mast: baseline IC08 peak 31.8 m/s vs observed 31.5 m/s; KGE=0.50, CC=0.55 after peak alignment. Systematically compares DA vs IA assimilation and z0=0.0002/0.0028 m, quantifying their effects on TKE, von Kármán-fitted spectra, and Welch-method coherence at turbine scale (≤300 m) against IEC 61400-1 Class T / Cat. A+–C standards. Key finding: DA over-amplifies TKE 2–4× and nearly doubles coherence integrals in the typhoon wake (P5), so IA + internal forcing is preferable for turbine inflow generation.

points: WRF-simulated Nesat track has southward bias (~3.8–17.7 km) and peak wind arrives ~1 h early, attributed to SCS cyclone intensity underestimation and Fujiwhara effect (Sect. 3.2).
LES wind-speed variance in primary extreme-wind phase P2 is ~52% lower than mast observations; mechanism re-energising turbulence between P3–P5 not fully captured (Sect. 4.1, Conclusions).
Surface roughness z0 only weakly affects results: 7–16% TKE change and ~16% coherence drop for δ=40 m (Sect. 4.3, 5.1).
DA assimilation unrealistically inflates TKE 2–4× and coherence in typhoon wake; must be applied with caution for turbine inflow (Sect. 4.3, 5.3).
LES domain 1×1×1 km is smaller than 3–5 km typically used for unstable/TC boundary layers due to compute budget; 10 m grid causes spectrum to drop above 0.4 Hz (Sect. 2.4, 5.2).
Method demonstrated only on Nesat — generalisation to other typhoons (Central Mountain Range, Fujiwhara interactions, different intensity/track) requires re-tuning and re-validation (Conclusions).
MMC is computationally too expensive to replace Holland-Monte Carlo for design statistics; authors propose a neural-network surrogate trained on MMC outputs as future work (Conclusions).
Authors recommend two-way WRF-LES coupling as a future diagnostic to explain the under-predicted LES turbulence (Conclusions).

self_assessment.caveats: Conclusions drawn from the full text layer of the PDF; Figs. 4, 6, 9–17 interpreted from captions, tables (Tables 2, 3, 4, 5) and body discussion rather than re-quantising the raster plots.

content.notes: Second ledger entry; offline MMC with WRF→SOWFA for tropical-cyclone BL — complements the WRF4PALM seed entry (both are LES-as-microscale, both one-way/offline).

title: Assessing scale-dependent urban wind loss patterns: A CFD analysis of realistic urban segments from 1980 to 2020

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/2025-Assessing scale-dependent urban wind loss patterns -- A CFD analysis of realistic urban segments from 1980 to 2020.pdf
source.journal_pages: Sustainable Cities and Society 133 (2025) 106841; PDF 16 pages

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Sect. 2.2: OpenFOAM v2006 steady RNG k-epsilon RANS (simpleFoam) with prescribed power-law inflow (alpha=0.2, U_ref=8 m/s at z_ref=300 m); no WRF/COSMO/PALM nesting or mesoscale fields as BC. Intro cites WRF+UCM only as prior mesoscale assessment context.

self_assessment.caveats: Structured from PyMuPDF full-text extraction; quantitative claims cross-checked with abstract/body; raster figures not re-digitized.

title: Street Canyon Air Pollution and Pedestrian Health Risk Affected by Household Volatile Chemical Products (VCPs) Emission

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/2025-Street Canyon Air Pollution and Pedestrian Health Risk Affected by Household Volatile Chemical Products (VCPs) Emission.pdf

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Sect. 2.1-2.2.4: APFoam (OpenFOAM-based) chemistry on mapped mesh with steady RANS k-epsilon flow precomputed in ANSYS Fluent; inlet velocity from analytic power law (Eqs 6-8, U_ref=3 m/s) and uniform initial/background species from PRD literature values (Sect. 2.2.4), not WRF/COSMO/PALM one-way nesting. Emission fluxes from ROE traffic inventory and consumer-product VOC inventory (Sect. 2.2.2). PALM appears only as cited prior work in Introduction (ref. 25), not in this paper's model chain.

self_assessment.caveats: Q1 false: 1A-1C skipped per skill. Analysis from PDF text layer; Sect. 5 LIMITATIONS read for context but not mapped to q1c because trans-scale workflow absent.

content.notes: skipped_1a_1b_1c_due_to_q1_false; Sect. 5 notes omitted processes (cooking, BVOCs, solar diurnal, AR, moving traffic) and VOC-specific health assessment beyond O3/NO2.

title: A framework combining multi-scale model and unmanned aerial vehicle for investigating urban micro-meteorology, thermal comfort, and energy balance

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/A framework combining multi-scale model and unmanned aerial vehicle for investigating urban micro-meteorology, thermal comfort, and energy balance.pdf
source.journal_pages: Sustainable Cities and Society 115 (2024) 105847; PDF 15 pages

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Abstract: coupled mesoscale + microscale models; Sect. 2.1: WRF (ARW 4.5) supplies time-varying profiles resampled/interpolated to PALM four lateral + top boundaries and soil T/q at bottom (one-way/offline driving).

q1a_main_method.rationale: Sect. 2.1.2–3.2: PALM explicitly performs LES for urban microscale; case uses 10 m grid, PALM-4U modules (Table 3). Intro cites RANS/LES in prior literature only; no RANS-based PALM results reported.

content.q1b_unique_contribution: 提出并验证「UAV 摄影测量（DSM/DOM，约 21 cm×16 cm）+ 修正 WRF 静态土地利用/城市冠层参数 + WRF 单向驱动 PALM」的框架：用 DSM 纠正 GLC2020 对雄安建成区误分类，提取建筑与不透水面/水体并生成 PALM 静态场；WRF 最内层 0.5 h 输出驱动 PALM 侧/顶边界更新；针对 2023 年 6 月热浪案例给出 HDA/HRA/NRA 分区下的近地面气象、PET 热应力与 Q*/QH/QS/QE 机理分析，并与屋顶微气象站对比以量化相对纯 WRF 的改进。

points: Sect. 2.3：缺乏人为热数据故未纳入；热浪期稳定小风假设下忽略风致平流热通量，地表能量平衡为简化形式。
Sect. 4.1：多尺度方案未包含植被，限制水汽产生；PALM 中化学/物理过程简化导致相对湿度低估偏大。
Sect. 5：尚需更多研究才能形成可操作的城市规划指南；植被、人为热与平流热对局地气候/热舒适及能量平衡的贡献将在更精细尺度上进一步研究；背景强迫与局地障碍相对贡献列为未来重点。

self_assessment.caveats: 基于 PDF 可读文本层；统计量与结论以摘要、方法、验证与第 5 节为主，未对栅格图重新数字化。

content.notes: User-requested SKILL-driven analysis of Hang et al. (2024) SCS UAV+WRF-PALM framework.

title: Computational Fluid Dynamics for urban physics: Importance, scales, possibilities, limitations and ten tips and tricks towards accurate and reliable simulations

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/Computational Fluid Dynamics for urban physics.pdf

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Sect. 3 taxonomy (Figs. 5-7): distinguishes NWP/MMM vs CFD; states CFD may receive BCs from mesoscale MMM or empirical/theoretical profiles and cites literature on coupling MMM with CFD / downscaling / upscaling [130,143,145], with MM5 nested-grid as illustrative mesoscale output [144]. No WRF/COSMO/PALM-to-OpenFOAM (or equivalent) offline nesting workflow, toolchain, or validation is implemented or analyzed as this paper's subject; Sect. 4-6 center on standalone microscale CFD theory, RANS-focused best-practice tips, and outlook.

self_assessment.caveats: PyMuPDF full-text extraction of 27-page PDF; Q1 judged against trans-scale coupling/nesting as primary research object (skill), not incidental meso-micro BC mention in a review.

content.notes: skipped_1a_1b_1c_due_to_q1_false; User-requested SKILL analysis of Blocken (2015) Building and Environment review/position paper.

title: Reconstructing fine-scale 3D wind fields with terrain-informed machine learning

source.journal_pages: Nat Commun (in press, 2026); main ~29 pp; supplementary ~12 pp (Fuxi-CFD_supplementary.pdf)

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Introduction: WRF dynamical downscaling appears only as cited prior-art context (cost, turbulence/steep-terrain limits), not as a driver in this study. Methods Sect. 4.1-4.2 + Suppl. Sec. 2: >12k steady OpenFOAM simpleFoam (realizable k-epsilon RANS) cases with synthetic log-law ABL inflow per terrain; no WRF/COSMO/PALM outputs supplied as nested microscale BCs. Sect. 2.4: real-world check is FuXi-CFD vs ERA5 vertical-profile baselines at towers, not a mesoscale-to-microscale model coupling workflow. Suppl. 2.3 "Solver and coupling" refers to SIMPLE pressure-velocity coupling.

self_assessment.caveats: Full main+supplementary text extracted with PyMuPDF UTF-8; Q1 per SKILL excludes generic km-to-30m downscaling unless mesoscale-NWP-to-microscale-solver nesting/coupling is the research object; figure raster values not re-digitized.

content.notes: skipped_1a_1b_1c_due_to_q1_false; literature-trans-scale-analysis SKILL on Fuxi-CFD.pdf + supplementary.

title: Sensitivity analysis of WRF-CFD-based downscaling methods for evaluation of urban pedestrian-level wind

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/Huang-2023-WRF-CFD-Sensitivity analysis of WRF-CFD-based downscaling methods for evaluation of urban pedestrian-level wind.pdf
source.journal_pages: Urban Climate (2023) 101569; PDF 22 pages (in-press-style header in PDF)

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Abstract + Fig.1: three-stage WRF-CFD in Meteodyn; Sect. 2: WRF (nested 27/9/3 km, FNL-driven, 5-min output) supplies mesoscale cell time series to microscale CFD; Sect. 1: weak coupling / Physical-Statistical Coupling (Sanz Rodrigo et al. 2017)—WRF wind speed/direction matched to 16-sector parametric CFD outputs, not classical two-way online coupling.

q1a_main_method.rationale: Sect. 2 (opening) and Sect. 2.3-2.4: steady-state RANS for Meteodyn WT (parametric) and Urbawind (full-information CFD, MIGAL-UNS); LES/URANS not used in reported experiments.

content.q1b_unique_contribution: Commercial Meteodyn toolchain: three-layer downscaling WRF mesoscale (MSP) + parametric large-domain CFD (WT, ~50 m horizontal grid) + building-resolving CFD (Urbawind, unstructured RANS) with Physical-Statistical Coupling instead of strong online coupling; sensitivity of six schemes (A on-site; B WRF-to-Urbawind at 50/100/200 m; C full chain) for pedestrian-level wind (PLW); long-term tower data after QC; recommends ~200 m mesoscale height as CFD inflow reference in complex high-rise urban contexts.

points: Introduction: mesoscale-CFD resolution gap; mesoscale BCs often incomplete (e.g. turbulence estimates), motivating a transitional parametric CFD layer.
Discussion Sect. 4: 15 m rooftop measurements surrounded by tall buildings show wind-direction deflection vs mesoscale dominant direction.

Discussion Sect. 4: linear-fit R2 for pedestrian-height mean wind speed remains modest; best C200 R2 ~0.093 vs measured spatial means, indicating limited but relative best pedestrian-level reproduction.
Conclusions Sect. 5: parametric homogenized roughness errors vs full-building large-domain cost trade-off reiterated from literature context.

Sect. 3.2: validation window narrowed by measurement QC (e.g. zero-wind episodes, faulty months); microscale period May 1-Jul 27, 2018 vs longer mesoscale run—generalisation to other sites/seasons not exhaustively claimed.

self_assessment.caveats: PyMuPDF text layer; figure raster values not re-digitized; PDF front matter shows placeholder volume/issue string Urban Climate xxx (xxxx) xxx.

content.notes: literature-trans-scale-analysis SKILL user request; Huang et al. 2023 Urban Climate.

title: Study on micro-atmospheric environment by coupling large eddy simulation with mesoscale model

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/Liu et al. - 2012 - Study on micro-atmospheric environment by coupling large eddy simulation with mesoscale model.pdf
source.journal_pages: J. Wind Eng. Ind. Aerodyn. 107-108 (2012) 106-117; PDF 12 pages

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Abstract + Sect. 2.4: WRF (ARW 3.0.1, five nests to 0.5 km, FNL) pre-computes city-scale flow; time-varying u and theta on all LES lateral/top boundaries updated every 15 min via interpolation to LES mesh (one-way/offline nesting).

q1a_main_method.rationale: Sect. 2-4: in-house FVM-LES with Lagrangian dynamic SGS, IBM in fine core + Belcher-type drag canopy outside; diurnal wind/T/CO and resolved TKE reported. RANS appears only as cited prior mesoscale-CFD coupling (Intro), not used in this paper results.

content.q1b_unique_contribution: Early JWEA demonstration of one-way WRF-to-LES lateral driving for a full diurnal Beijing street-scale case (2009-10-26): sub-first-WRF-layer power-law vertical extrapolation plus bilinear/trilinear mapping; combined building model (fine IBM-resolved central patch vs coarse drag-only surround) to cut cost vs fully resolved domain (~16x grid/CPU estimate in Conclusions) while beating all-drag Case 2 on Hanna-style metrics; CO traffic source with hourly Meng et al. factor.

points: Sect. 5: LES ideally needs instantaneous turbulent inflow at lateral boundaries but mesoscale supplies only large-scale motion; no synthetic turbulence—mitigation by siting fine core ~600 m inside domain and relying on building-generated turbulence (spectra checked in core).
Sect. 5: better boundary turbulence generation for mesoscale-LES coupling left to future work.
Sect. 5: single dry clear day; moisture, evaporation and dispersion processes for future.
Sect. 4.1: CO deviations partly from emission inventory k(t) being period-average rather than specific to the simulated day.

self_assessment.caveats: Structured from PyMuPDF UTF-8 text of 12-page PDF; raster figures and spectral plots not re-digitized.

content.notes: literature-trans-scale-analysis SKILL user request; Liu et al. 2012 JWEA.

title: Improving accuracy in simulation of urban wind flows by dynamic downscaling WRF with OpenFOAM

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/WRF-OpenFOAM-Improving accuracy in simulation of urban wind flows by dynamic.pdf

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Abstract + Sect.2.2-2.5: one-way nested WRF-UCM (9/3/1 km, FNL lateral BCs) supplies hourly wind vectors to OpenFOAM; Sect.2.5 describes uniform inlet velocity updated each hour from WRF-UCM NetCDF outputs and a Linux shell workflow that reassigns inlet/outlet patches by mesoscale wind direction (offline dynamic downscaling to <10 m building-resolving CFD).

q1a_main_method.rationale: Sect.2.5: steady incompressible RANS k-epsilon solved with OpenFOAM porousSimpleFoam (SIMPLE); default C_mu etc.; buildings as walls with wall functions; vegetation as Darcy-Forchheimer porous cellZone. No LES/URANS case results reported.

content.q1b_unique_contribution: 面向印度那格浦尔 1 km^2 x 50 m 城市子域的 proof-of-concept：WRF-UCM（WRF v3.9 + SL-UCM，YSU PBL 等）与 OpenFOAM 单向离线链式降尺度；按小时读取中尺度风矢并在立方体计算域四侧自动切换进/出口面 + 更新均匀入口风速；建筑与连片植被简化为长方体并用 snappyHexMesh（约 65 万控制体，近墙 0.5-1 m）；植被阻风用各向同性 Darcy-Forchheimer；对 2018-01-11-18 10 m 风与站点观测对比，WRF-UCM+OF 的风向吻合优于 WRF-UCM，风速 NMB/NMGE 相对 WRF-UCM 明显改善（摘要/表6）。

points: Sect.4 Limitations 1: 仅考虑风与建筑/地面/植被的运动学相互作用，未耦合能量交换过程。
Sect.4 item 2: CFD 垂直域固定 50 m，建议未来依据中尺度 PBL/混合层高度动态调整域高。
Sect.4 item 3: OpenFOAM 侧未显式考虑温度对近地层风的短程效应（大尺度温度效应仍由 WRF-UCM 驱动风场间接体现）。
Sect.4 item 4: 中尺度到建筑尺度传递 TKE/耗散仍是难题；YSU 等 PBL 未必输出 TKE；入口湍流强度 I 与长度尺度 L 的假设需用观测并按大气稳定度更新。
Sect.2.5: 采用恒定 I=40%、L=10 m，正文指出可用时变 I 以提高精度。
Sect.3 Results: 建议开展网格依赖性分析以支撑后续应用推广。
Sect.2.5/结论: 建筑与树冠几何简化为长方体、树冠细节省略会增加建模误差。
Sect.5 Conclusions: 风向仍存在与观测不一致，强调局地随机因素难以被确定性模型完全刻画。

self_assessment.caveats: 基于 PDF 可读文本层（pypdf 提取）；图件数值以摘要/正文/表6 为准，未对栅格图重数字化；排版在 Limitations 与 Table 5 之间插入表格，编号以正文列举为准。

content.notes: literature-trans-scale-analysis SKILL 用户请求；Kadaverugu et al. 2021 Urban Climate。

title: Development of a micro-in-meso-scale framework for simulating pollutant dispersion and wind environment in building groups

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/WRF-OpenFOAM-Leng-2022-Development of a micro-in-meso-scale framework for simulating pollutant.pdf

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Abstract + Sect. 2.2: WRF 4.1 mesoscale run first; OpenFOAM microscale second; WRF wind/T interpolated to CFD mesh for initial and time-varying lateral BCs. Sect. 2.2.2: explicitly one-way coupling (WRF drives OpenFOAM only).

q1a_main_method.rationale: Sect. 2.2.2 + case Sect. 5: building-resolved flow uses OpenFOAM simpleFoam (steady incompressible SIMPLE) with standard k-epsilon; scalarTransportFoam then solves passive scalar concentration in that frozen wind field. WRF LES switch appears only in the mesoscale second WRF session (~100 m), not as the microscale solver in reported OpenFOAM experiments.

content.q1b_unique_contribution: 面向建筑运维/设计人员的 MiM 平台：ERA5 驱动 WRF 4.1 两段（四重嵌套至约 1 km + 第二段开启 WRF-LES 设置输出约 100 m）与 SLUCM；Python 自动选型/写控制文件并把经纬度+气压层结果映射到 CFD 三维网格；OpenFOAM 内嵌插值模块做时空调制边界；用 6H 外围 auxiliary zone 缓解 WRF 粗糙城市表示与 CFD 解析建筑几何的不一致；GIS 自动爬取/修正/三角化建筑并与 Cesium Web 可视化联动；在 simpleFoam k-ε 风场基础上用 scalarTransportFoam 支持污染扩散场景演示；四城算例+深圳 WRF 与观测对比论证流程可行。

points: 框架仍无法完全消除人工经验；爬取建筑数据难以覆盖小型与临时结构，需 Web 端手工补建。
WRF 城市方案当前固定 SLUCM；作者承认未纳入 BEP/BEP_BEM 的系统比较使跨尺度结果可靠性受「僵化选型」瓶颈制约。
OpenFOAM 段未显式耦合非均匀温度对风与扩散；假定域内温度均匀，强日照或大温差场景精度下降；后续拟改 OpenFOAM 源码纳入温度–流场相互作用。
验证侧重流程自动化与 WRF 风场相对观测一致性；CFD/建筑尺度浓度链条的现场实测验证不足，结论亦写明「缺乏验证流程」。
WRF 城市冠层参数化与 CFD 建筑几何表示不一致；虽用 auxiliary zone 削弱核心区误差，本质差异仍存在。

self_assessment.caveats: PyMuPDF 全文 UTF-8 提取；数值以正文/式(1)-(5)与第 5-6 节为准，未对栅格图重数字化。

content.notes: literature-trans-scale-analysis SKILL 用户请求；Leng et al. 2022 J. Cleaner Production.

title: Simulating Urban Flow and Dispersion in Beijing by coupling a CFD model with the WRF model

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/WRF-OpenFoam-MiaoYucong-2013-Simulating Urban Flow and Dispersion in Beijing by coupling a CFD with WRF.pdf

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Abstract + Sect. 4.2: one-way nesting; innermost WRF 1 km grid cell nearest CFD domain supplies profiles (u,v,T,TKE,ABL height) for OpenFOAM lateral BCs; epsilon from Eq.(10); steady buoyantBoussinesqSimpleFoam runs at 1000/1400 LST 9 Sep 2009.

q1a_main_method.rationale: Sect. 2.2 and 4.3: buoyantBoussinesqSimpleFoam solves RANS with standard k-epsilon and SIMPLE for steady urban flow; passive scalar transport (Eq. 4) for dispersion. No LES/URANS case results reported.

content.q1b_unique_contribution: 较早的开源 WRF v3.3 + OpenFOAM 2.1.0 北京中关村真实街区个例：四重单向嵌套至 1 km（FNL，MYJ PBL 输出 TKE），因缺本地数据未启用城市冠层；CFD 域约 1 km 水平尺度与最内层 WRF 格距相同，故仅用最近一个中尺度格点柱廓线驱动 101x101x91 结构网格（水平 10 m、建筑简化为 91 个长方体）；先以汉堡大学风洞单幢建筑实验验证 OpenFOAM，再在谷风/海风转换日选取 10:00 与 14:00 LST 两时刻做稳态绕流与被动示踪（点源/道路线源）分析；强调街区风场与 WRF 环境风显著偏离，并系统对比对称豁口与 step-down/step-up 街谷在近地浓度累积上的不同机制（弱上升 vs 下沉涡移位），以及线源羽流形态不能仅用环境风向解释。

points: Sect. 4.1.1: WRF 未使用城市冠层参数化（缺乏适配北京的数据），列为未来工作。
Sect. 4.1.2-5: 近地层风速高于观测、夜间谷风消退偏快、风向命中率有限；讨论网格代表性、测站周边建筑拖曳及需引入 UCP 并用本地形态学数据率定。
Sect. 4.3.1: 西侧边界与最西排建筑造成不真实狭管流，建议增大建筑到侧边界距离。
Sect. 5: 高分辨率耦合结果缺乏建筑尺度现场验证，作者称其为合理数值实验并需后续验证。
Sect. 4.3.2: 用单时刻稳态流场近似驱动 5-10 分钟短时扩散。

self_assessment.caveats: PyMuPDF UTF-8 text extraction; quantitative claims from abstract/body/Tables 1-2; raster figures not re-digitized.

content.notes: literature-trans-scale-analysis SKILL user request; Miao et al. 2013 Adv. Atmos. Sci.

title: Investigating the impact of temporal wind-speed variations on wind power modeling using a dynamically coupled meso-microscale simulation framework

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Abstract + Sect. II: WOCSS integrates WRF with OpenFOAM via preCICE; Sect. II.B: one-way serial-explicit coupling with WRF outputs averaged to OpenFOAM timestep and mapped to OF boundaries each coupling step (online/memory-based), contrasted with hourly snapshot offline BC workflow.

q1a_main_method.rationale: Sect. II.C: OpenFOAM uses transient pimpleFoam (PIMPLE, implicit backward time) with realizable k-epsilon closure for WOCSS; Sect. II.D: baseline snapshot comparison uses steady SIMPLE runs—RANS steady-state control only, not the primary WOCSS configuration in results.

content.q1b_unique_contribution: 提出 WRF-OpenFOAM Coupled Simulation System（WOCSS）：基于 preCICE 与自研 WRF-preCICE 适配器，在系统内存中实现中尺度 WRF 与微尺度 OpenFOAM 的在线单向动态耦合（文中将 WRF 输出按与 CFD 匹配的时间窗平均后下传至界面），把耦合时间尺度从传统快照法的小时级推进到与 WRF/CFD 时间步相当的秒级，以捕捉非线性短时风速变化对功率的影响；界面处结合 WRF 最底层格点高度分割、近地层经验关系与 k/ε 估计，并用 OpenFOAM 域内缓冲带平滑中–微地形高程不一致；广西龙脊复杂地形风电场个例对比 WRF 单独、WOCSS 与小时快照法的风速/风向及 Vestas V82 功率曲线结果，报告非线性变风时段小时平均功率差异可达机组额定容量约 52.2%，并给出简化电价情景下的净收益对比。

points: Sect. V: WRF 物理参数化方案组合具有适用性边界，结果受驱动气象资料质量影响；未来需按局地地形与大气过程选择兼容方案与强迫场。
Sect. V: 采用绝热求解并忽略热力层结；强稳定条件下该假设不成立，未来需纳入大气稳定度以扩展适用性。
Sect. V: 验证基于三座上游测风塔、未显式建模风机与尾流，可能高估风速与发电量；应用于风电场尺度需显式风机模型。
Sect. V: 动态耦合计算成本高，慢变风场下快照法仍具成本优势；未来可探索动态耦合与快照的自适应时间策略以降低日前预报总成本。

self_assessment.caveats: PyMuPDF UTF-8 text extraction; quantitative claims from abstract, Sect. II/IV/V and figure captions; raster plots not re-digitized.

content.notes: literature-trans-scale-analysis SKILL user request; Wu et al. 2026 Physics of Fluids.

title: Implementation of an embedded LES model with parameter assessment for predicting surface pressure and surrounding flow of an isolated building

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/WRF-OpenFOAM-ZhangYuxin-2023-Implementation of an embedded LES model with parameter assessment for.pdf

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Sect. 2-4: zonal embedded LES (inner Smagorinsky LES + outer k-epsilon RANS) with interface BCs in OpenFOAM 7 only; Sect. 3: equilibrium ABL validation with prescribed RANS inlet profiles and TPU-based length scales for RFG; no WRF/COSMO/PALM, no one-way mesoscale-to-microscale nesting or coupling workflow. Full-text extraction contains zero occurrences of WRF/mesoscale/offline nesting.

self_assessment.caveats: Q1 false: 1A-1C skipped per SKILL. Analysis from PyMuPDF UTF-8 text of 17-page PDF; figure raster values not re-digitized.

content.notes: skipped_1a_1b_1c_due_to_q1_false; Repo PDF filename uses WRF-OpenFOAM prefix but paper is standalone CFD (ELES); microscale turbulence is mixed LES+RANS by design yet not trans-scale NWP nesting.

title: A framework for efficient simulation of urban strong wind field during typhoon process using coupled WRF-UCM and embedded LES model

source.pdf_path: docs/reference-candidate/WRF-OpenFOAM-ZhangYuxin-2024-A framework for efficient simulation of urban strong wind field during.pdf
source.journal_pages: J. Wind Eng. Ind. Aerodyn. 250 (2024) 105757; PDF ~18 pp

q1_meso_micro_coupling.evidence: Abstract + Sect. 2.3: one-way mesoscale-to-microscale; WRF-UCM (BEP, LCZ) supplies campus wind direction via tslist and hourly-mean u, TKE profiles for RANS inflow (log-law fit, Eqs. 8-10); 12 OpenFOAM 7 ELES cases from WRF d03 (0.3 km).

q1a_main_method.mixed_specify: ELES: outer standard k-epsilon RANS + inner Smagorinsky-Van Driest LES
q1a_main_method.rationale: Sect. 3.2 Hagupit case: ~3M-cell RANS envelope plus ~1.2M-cell inner LES around library; reported temporal-mean campus-scale flow (RANS) and fluctuating wind/building pressure in LES zone.

content.q1b_unique_contribution: 面向台风来临前防灾窗口：WRF 4.5 三重单向嵌套+FNL+nudging，WUDAPT/LCZ 细化城市类型并耦合 BEP 多层冠层，输出逐时局地风向与 u、k 廓线；微尺度用 ELES（外 RANS 内 LES、IRCDRFG 入口脉动、混合界面与净通量修正）在 OpenFOAM 7 实现，将 Hagupit(2020) 过境同济四平校区拆为 12 个小时段并通过旋转城市模型适配固定入流；WRF 廓线经对数/经验式拟合为 inflow；总链约 33 h（WRF~16 h + 12xELES 各 8-17 h，64 核）相对影响时段仍留 >20 h 余量；强调全台风过程小时段敏感性。

points: Sect. 4.3: scarce typhoon in-situ data in Shanghai; cannot quantitatively validate building pressure/velocity in this urban case.
Sect. 3.1.2: WRF intensity weaker than JMA (RMSE CSLP ~6.43 hPa, MWS ~3.71 m/s), partly coarse outer nest.
Sect. 4.3: inner LES patch must avoid strongly unsteady temporal-mean wind; interface lag can destabilize net flux / diverge.
Sect. 4.3: target building needs clearance for interface overlap recovery; otherwise inaccurate inner fields.
Sect. 4.3: IRCDRFG / typhoon ABL parameters need field verification; domain decomposition needed to speed ELES for whole-city scale.
Sect. 4.1: chain not hourly like NWP; hourly cases still delayed hours to >10 h.
Sect. 2.2.3: isolated-building validation underestimates lateral mean Cp; turbulent length-scale info incomplete.

self_assessment.caveats: PyMuPDF UTF-8 text; occasional symbol garbling in extraction; figures not re-digitized.

content.notes: literature-trans-scale-analysis SKILL user request; Zhang et al. 2024 JWEA.
